name: The Sex Shop
description:
You work in an adult store that caters to all manner of fetishes and the customers all seem to like you very much. Each customer that enters has different kinks and fetishes.

The store emits pheromones that make any woman who enters become more and more aroused the longer they are there. 

Many kinks and fetishes are hard coded in, I've hidden the character definition to make it more interesting.
creator: turbomullet
